title: How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You’re a creator in Nigeria, Pakistan, or Venezuela. PayPal blocks you. Stripe won’t let you onboard. Gumroad and Payhip are useless without a supported bank. You’ve got ebooks, courses, templates, or fonts ready to sell, but no way to collect payment. Crypto is your only option, but how do you set it up without coding or KYC headaches? This guide walks you through building a crypto-only digital product store that automates delivery, verifies payments, and works globally. No subscriptions. No platforms taking a cut. Just you, your buyers, and instant transactions.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This system bypasses centralized payment processors entirely. It uses crypto wallets and automated smart contracts to verify payments and deliver products instantly. No KYC, no bank accounts, no geographic blocks. Buyers scan a QR code, pay in any of 300+ coins, and get their download link immediately. You get paid directly to your wallet. The backend handles price conversion, receipt generation, and file delivery without you lifting a finger. It’s built for creators in restricted markets who need a no-fail solution.
What You Need Before You Start

You need three things: a crypto wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or similar), your digital product files hosted online (Google Drive, Dropbox, or a free CDN), and a domain or GitHub page to host your store. If you’re selling fonts, templates, or presets, zip the files to prevent link sharing. For courses or ebooks, use PDFs or password-protected folders. The system will automate delivery once payment is verified, so organize your files with clear naming conventions. No technical skills required—just follow the steps.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Use the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) to set up your backend. It integrates with NOWPayments for crypto processing and handles automated delivery. Add your product details, set prices in USD, and connect your wallet address. The engine converts prices to crypto at transaction time and generates QR codes for buyers. For frontend integration, add Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to let buyers pay with any wallet. It supports BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300+ coins. Test the flow by sending a small transaction to yourself to ensure delivery works.
Crypto payments bypass geographic blocks and banking restrictions—no KYC required.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Deploy your store to your domain or a free GitHub page. Share the link with your audience via social media, email, or forums. When a buyer scans the QR code and pays, the system verifies the transaction and sends the download link automatically. You’ll get a notification in your wallet and a transaction log in the Admin Dashboard ($29.99). For your first sale, offer a discount or bonus to build trust. Once the system is live, it runs itself—no manual intervention needed.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your first sales come in, reinvest in marketing to reach more buyers. Add new products to your store without touching the backend. Use the Admin Dashboard to track sales, manage orders, and analyze buyer behavior. If you’re selling globally, consider adding language options or localizing your pricing. For developers, the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) includes priority updates and Discord support to customize the system further. Focus on creating more products—the payment and delivery pipeline is already handling the rest.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

To sell an ebook without PayPal, use a crypto-based system like the one outlined here. Set up a wallet, host your ebook file, and integrate a payment processor like NOWPayments. Buyers pay in crypto, and the system delivers the ebook automatically. No PayPal, Stripe, or bank account required. This method works for any digital product—courses, templates, fonts, or presets—and bypasses geographic restrictions entirely.
Automated delivery means you never have to manually send files or verify payments.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you’re selling Notion templates for Bitcoin or digital downloads with zero fees, this system is your solution. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) lets buyers pay with any crypto wallet, from BTC to SOL. Get started at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and build a store that works anywhere, for anyone.
Your Action Checklist

Get a crypto wallet and fund it with a small amount of test crypto. Host your product files on Google Drive or a CDN. Purchase the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) and set up your backend. Add Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) for frontend integration. Test the payment and delivery flow with a small transaction. Deploy your store to a domain or GitHub page. Share your store link with your audience. Make your first sale and track it in the Admin Dashboard ($29.99).
One-time payment, lifetime access—no subscriptions or recurring fees for you or your buyers.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
